## Datadog Stock Estimated Approximately 8% Above Fair Value Following AI Revenue Disclosure

A modest fair-value premium following an AI revenue disclosure suggests the market has begun pricing in DDOG's AI monetization but may leave limited multiple expansion headroom; PM should assess whether the underlying AI revenue growth rate justifies paying above fair value here.

- Simplywall.st publishes a fair-value analysis placing Datadog (DDOG) approximately 8% above estimated intrinsic value.
- The analysis is framed as a response to a recent AI revenue disclosure by the company.
- High classifier confidence; ties AI monetization progress to current valuation.
- The estimated 8% premium implies limited margin of safety at current prices on a fair-value basis.
